title: Catherine Bélanger Pâquet
content:
## Catherine Bélanger Pâquet
People.ContactEmail cbelangerpaquet@mccarthy.ca
Catherine Bélanger Pâquet is a Partner in the Litigation Group of the Québec City office. She has approximately ten years of experience handling complex civil and commercial matters, including class actions as well as professional and medical liability cases. She regularly appears before the civil courts, both at the trial and appellate levels. Recognized for her strategic, rigorous, and effective approach, Catherine stands out for her ability to provide practical, focused advice tailored to her clients’ needs.
Highly engaged in her community since the beginning of her practice, Catherine currently serves as Vice‑President of the Board of Directors of Justice Pro Bono. Within the firm, she also acts as Regional Lead for the Québec City office of the National Pride Action Group and actively participates in various initiatives aimed at promoting diversity and inclusion, particularly within the LGBTQ+ community. Her commitment was recognized by the Québec City Bar, which awarded her the Diversity Award in 2024. She is also a member of the Canadian Bar Association and the Québec City Young Bar Association.
Catherine served for several years as a co‑author of sections of JurisClasseur – Civil Procedure I as well as the LexisNexis edition of the Annotated Code of Civil Procedure . She holds a Bachelor of Business Administration (Finance), obtained with distinction from Bishop’s University in 2013, and a Bachelor of Civil Law from Université Laval (2016).
